name: sum_array
asm:
0x140001633      PUSH     RBP
  0x140001634      MOV      RBP, RSP
  0x140001637      SUB      RSP, 0x10
  0x14000163B      MOV      qword ptr [RBP + 0x10], RCX
  0x14000163F      MOV      dword ptr [RBP + 0x18], EDX
  0x140001642      MOV      dword ptr [RBP + -0x4], 0x0
  0x140001649      MOV      dword ptr [RBP + -0x8], 0x0
  0x140001650      JMP      0x14000166f
  0x140001652      MOV      EAX, dword ptr [RBP + -0x8]
  0x140001655      CDQE     
  0x140001657      LEA      RDX, [RAX*0x4]
  0x14000165F      MOV      RAX, qword ptr [RBP + 0x10]
  0x140001663      ADD      RAX, RDX
  0x140001666      MOV      EAX, dword ptr [RAX]
  0x140001668      ADD      dword ptr [RBP + -0x4], EAX
  0x14000166B      ADD      dword ptr [RBP + -0x8], 0x1
  0x14000166F      MOV      EAX, dword ptr [RBP + -0x8]
  0x140001672      CMP      EAX, dword ptr [RBP + 0x18]
  0x140001675      JL       0x140001652
  0x140001677      MOV      EAX, dword ptr [RBP + -0x4]
  0x14000167A      ADD      RSP, 0x10
  0x14000167E      POP      RBP
  0x14000167F      RET
